trajectory.reasoning:
WHAT YOU FOUND: The Comments History section contains no customer comments, staff notes, damage reports, or refund-related entries. Order shows Status: Complete, Shipped 1 item, Total Paid $98.02, Total Refunded $0.00, Order Date Nov 12, 2025.
WHERE YOU FOUND IT: Order #000000593 → Comments History tab and Order & Account Information section on http://localhost:7780/admin/sales/order/view/order_id/593/#comments_history
WHY IT MATTERS: The customer claims the package was crushed in shipping, but there is no documented evidence, prior complaint, or staff note supporting shipping damage. Since the order is already complete and fully paid with no refund history, the request cannot be approved or denied outright without additional documentation (e.g., photos, carrier claim). Escalation is required for investigation and verification.
